---
title: "GSE98965 baboon transcriptomic atlas - batch processing for BodyClocks"
output: github_document
---
```{r bodyclocks_setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
source(file.path("..", "R", "io_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "annotation_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "biomart_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "string_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "validation_utils.R"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "tables"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "reports"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "mouse"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "baboon"))
```


```{r libraries}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rain)
library(biomaRt)
library(STRINGdb)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r load_data}
# Load tissue metadata and all 64 CSV files into a named list
meta <- read.csv("data/meta/baboon_meta.csv")

# Build snake_case tissue names from full tissue labels
meta$tissue_name <- tolower(gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", meta$tissue))
meta$tissue_name <- sub("_$", "", meta$tissue_name)  # strip trailing underscore

fix_excel_genes <- function(symbol) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("^\\d{1,2}-Mar$", symbol) ~ paste0("MARCHF", sub("-Mar$", "", symbol)),
    grepl("^\\d{1,2}-Sep$", symbol) ~ paste0("SEPTIN", sub("-Sep$", "", symbol)),
    grepl("^\\d{1,2}-Dec$", symbol) ~ paste0("DELEC",  sub("-Dec$", "", symbol)),
    TRUE ~ symbol
  )
}

expected_tissue_paths <- file.path(
  "data", "raw", "GSE98965_csvs", paste0(meta$acronym, ".csv")
)
missing_tissue_paths <- expected_tissue_paths[!file.exists(expected_tissue_paths)]
if (length(missing_tissue_paths)) {
  stop(
    "Missing expected baboon tissue input file(s):\n",
    paste(missing_tissue_paths, collapse = "\n"),
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

tissues <- lapply(expected_tissue_paths, function(path) {
  read.csv(path) %>% mutate(Symbol = fix_excel_genes(Symbol))
})
names(tissues) <- meta$tissue_name

cat("Loaded", length(tissues), "tissues\n")
```

```{r setup}
# One-time setup: BioMart connection and phase colours

ensembl_mart <- tryCatch(
  connect_biomart("panubis_gene_ensembl"),
  error = function(e) {
    message("BioMart connection failed: ", e$message, "\nWill fall back to REST API per tissue.")
    NULL
  }
)

phase_colors <- c(
  "0"  = "greenyellow",
  "2"  = "lightgreen",
  "4"  = "cyan",
  "6"  = "skyblue",
  "8"  = "lightyellow",
  "10" = "yellow",
  "12" = "gold",
  "14" = "orange",
  "16" = "orangered",
  "18" = "purple",
  "20" = "navy",
  "22" = "darkblue",
  "24" = "greenyellow"
)
```

```{r helper_functions}
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Ensembl REST API: batch lookup of gene descriptions
# unname() prevents chunk-index prefixes on returned ENSEMBL IDs
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
batch_lookup <- function(ids, size = 500) {
  chunks  <- split(ids, ceiling(seq_along(ids) / size))
  results <- lapply(chunks, function(chunk) {
    res <- POST(
      "https://rest.ensembl.org/lookup/id",
      add_headers("Content-Type" = "application/json",
                  "Accept"       = "application/json"),
      body   = toJSON(list(ids = chunk)),
      encode = "raw"
    )
    if (status_code(res) != 200) stop("Request failed: ", status_code(res))
    fromJSON(content(res, "text", encoding = "UTF-8"), flatten = TRUE)
  })
  do.call(c, unname(results))
}
```

```{r process_tissue}
process_tissue <- function(raw_data, tissue_name, ensembl_mart, phase_colors) {

  cat("\n========================================\n")
  cat("Processing:", tissue_name, "\n")
  cat("========================================\n")

  # --- 1. FPKM filter ---
  # RNA-seq data: keep genes with mean FPKM >= 0.5 across all timepoints
  cat("Filtering by FPKM...\n")

  cleaned_data <- raw_data %>% dplyr::select(-Symbol)
  cleaned_data <- cleaned_data[rowMeans(cleaned_data[, -1]) >= 0.5, ]
  rownames(cleaned_data) <- cleaned_data$ENSEMBL
  data <- cleaned_data[, -1]

  cat("Genes after FPKM filter:", nrow(data), "\n")

  # --- 2. RAIN circadian analysis ---
  cat("Running RAIN analysis...\n")

  RAIN_result <- rain(t(data), deltat = 2, period = 24, nr.series = 1,
                      peak.border = c(0.3, 0.7), method = "independent",
                      adjp.method = "ABH", verbose = TRUE)

  RAIN_result$BH.Q    <- p.adjust(RAIN_result$pVal, method = "BH")
  RAIN_result$ENSEMBL <- rownames(RAIN_result)

  analysed <- merge(cleaned_data, RAIN_result,
                    by.x = "ENSEMBL", by.y = "ENSEMBL", all.x = TRUE)

  # --- 3. Gene annotation: BioMart primary, REST API fallback ---
  cat("Fetching gene annotations...\n")

  desc_df <- NULL

  # Try BioMart first
  if (!is.null(ensembl_mart)) {
    desc_df <- tryCatch({
      gene_info <- get_biomart_annotation(
        ids = analysed$ENSEMBL,
        mart = ensembl_mart,
        attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", "description"),
        filters    = "ensembl_gene_id",
        cache_key = paste0("baboon_atlas_", tissue_name, "_gene_info")
      )
      gene_info$description <- trimws(gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", gene_info$description))
      gene_info <- gene_info[!duplicated(gene_info$ensembl_gene_id), ]
      cat("BioMart annotation retrieved for", nrow(gene_info), "genes\n")
      data.frame(
        ENSEMBL     = gene_info$ensembl_gene_id,
        description = gene_info$description,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("BioMart lookup failed: ", e$message, "\nFalling back to Ensembl REST API.")
      NULL
    })
  }

  # Fallback: Ensembl REST API
  if (is.null(desc_df)) {
    cat("Fetching gene descriptions from Ensembl REST API...\n")
    raw_ann <- tryCatch(
      batch_lookup(analysed$ENSEMBL),
      error = function(e) {
        message("REST API lookup also failed: ", e$message)
        setNames(vector("list", length(analysed$ENSEMBL)), analysed$ENSEMBL)
      }
    )
    desc_df <- data.frame(
      ENSEMBL     = names(raw_ann),
      description = trimws(gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "",
                     sapply(raw_ann, function(x)
                       if (!is.null(x$description)) x$description else NA_character_))),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  # Symbol column from CSV is primary gene name (100% coverage after Excel fix)
  merged <- analysed %>%
    left_join(raw_data %>% dplyr::select(ENSEMBL, Symbol), by = "ENSEMBL") %>%
    left_join(desc_df, by = "ENSEMBL")

  write.csv(merged, file.path("results", "tables",
                              paste0(tissue_name, "_circ.csv")), row.names = FALSE)

  # --- 4. STRING network and enrichment ---
  cat("Building STRING network...\n")

  nodes_data <- merged %>%
    filter(pVal <= 0.005) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = Symbol)

  gene_list <- nodes_data$ENSEMBL
  enrichment_background_genes <- unique(rownames(data))
  out_dir   <- file.path("results", "shiny_data", "baboon", tissue_name)
  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  network_gene_info <- merged %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      preferred_symbol = Symbol,
      description = dplyr::coalesce(description, "")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(preferred_symbol), nzchar(preferred_symbol)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(preferred_symbol, .keep_all = TRUE)

  gene_mapping <- create_gene_mapping(
    gene_ids = merged$ENSEMBL,
    symbols = nodes_data$symbol,
    species_id = 9555
  )
  cat("Created mapping for", length(gene_mapping), "genes\n")

  enrichment_backgrounds <- get_string_enrichment_backgrounds(
    foreground_genes = gene_list,
    tested_genes = enrichment_background_genes,
    species_id = 9555
  )
  enrichment_background_bundle <- build_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
    enrichment_backgrounds = enrichment_backgrounds,
    nodes_data = nodes_data,
    gene_info = network_gene_info,
    gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
    phase_colors = phase_colors
  )
  save_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
    enrichment_background_bundle,
    output_dir = out_dir,
    prefix = tissue_name
  )

  if (length(gene_list) == 0) {
    cat("WARNING: No significant genes (pVal <= 0.005) for", tissue_name,
        "- saving empty network RDS files\n")
    for (suffix in c("_nodes", "_nodes_with_tooltips",
                     "_cluster_for_plot", "_cluster_descriptions")) {
      save_rds_checked(data.frame(), file = file.path(
        out_dir, paste0(tissue_name, suffix, ".rds")
      ))
    }
    save_string_edges_by_threshold(
      empty_string_edges_by_threshold(),
      output_dir = out_dir,
      prefix = tissue_name
    )
  } else {
    network_bundle <- get_string_network_bundle(
      gene_list = gene_list,
      gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
      species_id = 9555,
      nodes_data = nodes_data,
      include_enrichment = FALSE
    )
    network_outputs <- build_string_network_outputs(
      cluster_data = enrichment_backgrounds$backgrounds$all_string$cluster_data,
      nodes_data = nodes_data,
      gene_info = network_gene_info,
      gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
      phase_colors = phase_colors
    )
    save_string_network_outputs(
      outputs = network_outputs,
      edges = network_bundle$edges_by_threshold,
      output_dir = out_dir,
      prefix = tissue_name
    )
  }

  # --- 5. Plotting data (available two-hour ZT samples, single cycle) ---
  cat("Preparing plotting data...\n")

  # Iris lacks ZT22 in the source dataset; derive the time points rather than
  # requiring a complete 12-sample series for the app plotting artifacts.
  zt_cols <- grep("^ZT[0-9]{2}$", names(merged), value = TRUE)
  zt_hours <- as.numeric(sub("^ZT", "", zt_cols))
  zt_order <- order(zt_hours)
  zt_cols <- zt_cols[zt_order]
  zt_hours <- zt_hours[zt_order]
  if (!length(zt_cols)) {
    stop("No ZT expression columns found for tissue ", tissue_name,
         call. = FALSE)
  }
  atlas_plotting <- merged[, c("Symbol", zt_cols)]
  colnames(atlas_plotting) <- c("Gene", as.character(zt_hours))

  qval_df <- merged[, c("Symbol", "BH.Q")]
  colnames(qval_df) <- c("Gene", "BH.Q")

  atlas_plotting_long <- pivot_longer(atlas_plotting, cols = !Gene,
                                      names_to = "time_point", values_to = "mean")
  atlas_plotting_long <- inner_join(atlas_plotting_long, qval_df, by = "Gene")

  save_rds_checked(atlas_plotting_long, file = file.path(out_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_data.rds")))

  # --- 6. Display table ---
  cat("Preparing display table...\n")

  means       <- merged[, zt_cols]
  min_val     <- apply(means, 1, min)
  max_val     <- apply(means, 1, max)
  Amp_fc_log2 <- log2(max_val / min_val)
  Amp_fc      <- max_val / min_val

  display_dt <- cbind(merged, Amp_fc_log2, Amp_fc) %>%
    dplyr::select(Symbol, description, pVal, BH.Q, Amp_fc_log2, phase) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = Symbol) %>%
    arrange(BH.Q)

  save_rds_checked(display_dt, file = file.path(out_dir, paste0(tissue_name, "_display_dt.rds")))

  cat("Done:", tissue_name, "\n")
}
```

```{r batch_process}
tissue_failures <- character()
for (tissue_name in names(tissues)) {
  tryCatch({
    process_tissue(
      raw_data     = tissues[[tissue_name]],
      tissue_name  = tissue_name,
      ensembl_mart = ensembl_mart,
      phase_colors = phase_colors
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("\nERROR processing", tissue_name, ":", e$message, "\n")
    tissue_failures[[tissue_name]] <<- conditionMessage(e)
  })
}
if (length(tissue_failures)) {
  stop(
    "Baboon atlas processing failed for: ",
    paste(names(tissue_failures), collapse = ", "),
    ". See the errors above; incomplete enrichment backgrounds must not be ",
    "deployed.",
    call. = FALSE
  )
}
```
